title: DecisionTreeMetadata
description: Schema for metadata associated with trained Decision Tree models in the llmXive pipeline.

depth.description: The maximum depth of the decision tree.

model_type.description: The type of the model class.

file_path.description: Relative path to the saved model file.

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the model file contents.

size_bytes.description: Size of the model file in bytes.

training_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the model was trained.
